name: meeting-to-tickets
description: Turn meeting transcripts into DevRev-ready ticket drafts with Mom's-Test rigor. Adaptive pipeline: fast path (3 LLM stages) for short calls, full path (6+ LLM stages) for long calls. Produces neutral requirements briefs (requirements/*.md) and DevRev-ready tickets (devrev/*.md). Invariant checker enforces verbatim-quote provenance, AC traceability, walk-back coverage, and DevRev-canonical field shape.
